nasb.text: You, in Your great compassion, Did not forsake them in the wilderness; The pillar of cloud did not leave them by day, To guide them on their way, Nor the pillar of fire by night, to light for them the way in which they were to go.

esv.text: you in your great mercies did not forsake them in the wilderness. The pillar of cloud to lead them in the way did not depart from them by day, nor the pillar of fire by night to light for them the way by which they should go.

cnv.text: 你還是因著你豐盛的憐憫， 沒有把他們撇棄在曠野； 日間雲柱沒有離開他們， 仍然在路上引導他們； 夜間火柱也沒有離開他們，還是光照他們要行的路。

ccb.text: 你还是对他们大施怜悯，没有在旷野离弃他们。白天，云柱没有离开他们，仍然引导他们前行；夜间，火柱仍然照亮他们当走的路。
